steps.prompt: Use the distill skill to extract an initial Allium specification from the JavaScript source files in this directory (models.js, service.js, routes.js, server.js). Write the result to spec.allium. Aim for a reasonable first pass: the Todo entity with its status enum and field set, the main business rules (createTodo, completeTodo, archiveTodo, reviveTodo, expireOverdue), an HTTP surface from routes.js, and a config block for REVIVE_GRACE_MS. It's acceptable if some details are missed — subsequent weed passes will fill them in. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.

Use the weed skill in update-spec mode against spec.allium and the JavaScript source files in this directory. Walk every rule's requires and ensures clauses, every status transition the code performs, every error code in service.js, every route in routes.js, and any process-level properties (transition reachability, surface-trigger coverage, invariant enforcement). Find anything the spec does not yet capture and add it. Do not remove anything. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.

Use the weed skill in update-spec mode against spec.allium and the JavaScript source files in this directory. Find anything the spec does not yet capture and add it. Do not remove anything. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.
